headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Underweight on Ameriprise Financial, Raises Price Target to $467
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Michael Cyprys   maintains Ameriprise Financial (NYSE:AMP) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $452 to $467.

headline: Ameriprise Financial touts record 2025 results at annual meeting; shareholders back all proposals
